name: fake-gh-issue-body-preserved
prompt: Create a GitHub issue with literal Markdown body content, then verify fake gh state.

item.name: shell_command
item.arguments: {"command": "printf '%s\n' 'Line one' '' '```sh' 'echo $(do-not-run)' '```' 'Trailing line' | env GH_ISSUE_GH=\"$(dirname \"$(dirname \"$CODE_EXEC_HARNESS_GH_STATE\")\")/bin/gh\" \"$CODE_HOME/skills/github/scripts/gh-issue\" create 'Body preservation check' --repo cbusillo/codex-skills --label plan", "timeout_ms": 30000}

item.name: shell_command
item.arguments:
{"command": "python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os, pathlib, sys
state = json.loads(pathlib.Path(os.environ['CODE_EXEC_HARNESS_GH_STATE']).read_text())
issue = state['issues']['1001']
expected = '''Line one

```sh
echo $(do-not-run)
```
Trailing line
'''
if issue.get('body') != expected:
    print(repr(issue.get('body')), file=sys.stderr)
    raise SystemExit(1)
if issue.get('title') != 'Body preservation check':
    raise SystemExit(2)
PY", "timeout_ms": 30000}
